# dceasimR ![dceasimR logo](pkgdown/assets/logo.png)

**The first comprehensive R package for Distributional
Cost-Effectiveness Analysis (DCEA)** — implementing methods endorsed by
NICE (2025) and described in Cookson et al. (2020).

## Overview

Standard cost-effectiveness analysis treats a QALY gained by the most
deprived patient as equivalent to a QALY gained by the least deprived.
DCEA breaks this assumption by distributing health gains across
socioeconomic groups, measuring inequality impact, and applying social
welfare function weights.

`dceasimR` provides:

- **Aggregate DCEA** (Love-Koh et al. 2019) — the NICE-endorsed default
  method
- **Full-form DCEA** — for subgroup-specific evidence
- **Inequality indices** — SII, RII, concentration index, Atkinson, Gini
- **Social welfare functions** — EDE health, equity weights, welfare
  decomposition
- **Visualisation** — equity-efficiency impact plane, Lorenz curves, EDE
  profiles
- **Preloaded data** — England (IMD quintile), Canada (income quintile),
  WHO regions
- **NICE-formatted export** — tables, Excel workbooks, HTML reports

## NICE 2025 compliance

`dceasimR` implements the DCEA methods described in NICE’s modular
update to PMG36 (*Technology Evaluation Methods: Health Inequalities*,
2025). The aggregate DCEA approach follows Love-Koh et al. (2019) Value
in Health.

## Installation

``` r
# CRAN (once available)
install.packages("dceasimR")

# Development version from GitHub
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("heorlytics/dceasimR")
```

## Quick start

``` r
library(dceasimR)

# Run aggregate DCEA for a hypothetical NSCLC treatment (NICE TA style)
result <- run_aggregate_dcea(
  icer            = 28000,
  inc_qaly        = 0.45,
  inc_cost        = 12600,
  population_size = 12000,
  disease_icd     = "C34",   # Lung cancer -> uses internal HES utilisation data
  wtp             = 20000,
  opportunity_cost_threshold = 13000
)

# View summary
summary(result)

# Plot equity-efficiency impact plane
plot_equity_impact_plane(result)

# Sensitivity over inequality aversion
plot_ede_profile(result, eta_range = seq(0, 10, 0.1))

# Export NICE-formatted table
generate_nice_table(result, format = "flextable")
```

## Documentation

Full documentation and tutorials are available at
**<https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/>**

## Citation

If you use `dceasimR` in published research, please cite:

``` r
citation("dceasimR")
```

    Pandey S (2026). dceasimR: Distributional Cost-Effectiveness Analysis
    for Health Technology Assessment. R package version 0.1.0.
    https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/

## Key references

> Cookson R, Griffin S, Norheim OF, Culyer AJ (2020). *Distributional
> Cost-Effectiveness Analysis: Quantifying Health Equity Impacts and
> Trade-Offs.* Oxford University Press (<ISBN:9780198838197>).

> Love-Koh J, Asaria M, Cookson R, Griffin S (2019). The Social
> Distribution of Health: Estimating Quality-Adjusted Life Expectancy in
> England. *Value in Health* 22(5): 518-526.
> <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2018.10.007>

> Asaria M, Griffin S, Cookson R (2016). Distributional
> Cost-Effectiveness Analysis: A Tutorial. *Medical Decision Making*
> 36(1): 8-19. <https://doi.org/10.1177/0272989X15583266>

> NICE (2025). *Technology Evaluation Methods: Health Inequalities*
> (PMG36). National Institute for Health and Care Excellence, London.

> Robson M, Asaria M, Cookson R, Tsuchiya A, Ali S (2017). Eliciting the
> Level of Health Inequality Aversion in England. *Health Economics*
> 26(10): 1328-1334. <https://doi.org/10.1002/hec.3386>

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/heorlytics/dceasimR/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
and file issues at <https://github.com/heorlytics/dceasimR/issues>.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`build_staircase_data()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/build_staircase_data.md)
  : Build inequality staircase data from component inputs
- [`calc_all_inequality_indices()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_all_inequality_indices.md)
  : Calculate all inequality indices in one call
- [`calc_atkinson_index()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_atkinson_index.md)
  : Calculate Atkinson Index of Health Inequality
- [`calc_concentration_index()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_concentration_index.md)
  : Calculate Concentration Index
- [`calc_ede()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_ede.md)
  : Calculate Equally Distributed Equivalent Health (EDE)
- [`calc_ede_profile()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_ede_profile.md)
  : Calculate EDE over a range of eta values
- [`calc_equity_weight_profile()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_equity_weight_profile.md)
  : Equity weights over a range of eta values
- [`calc_equity_weighted_nhb()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_equity_weighted_nhb.md)
  : Calculate equity-weighted Net Health Benefit (NHB)
- [`calc_equity_weights()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_equity_weights.md)
  : Calculate Equity Weights
- [`calc_gini()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_gini.md)
  : Calculate Gini Coefficient for Health Distribution
- [`calc_rii()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_rii.md)
  : Calculate Relative Index of Inequality (RII)
- [`calc_sii()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_sii.md)
  : Calculate Slope Index of Inequality (SII)
- [`calc_social_welfare()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/calc_social_welfare.md)
  : Calculate Social Welfare Function value
- [`canada_income_hale`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/canada_income_hale.md)
  : Canada income quintile HALE data
- [`compute_generalised_lorenz_data()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/compute_generalised_lorenz_data.md)
  : Compute Generalised Lorenz curve data
- [`compute_lorenz_data()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/compute_lorenz_data.md)
  : Compute Lorenz curve data
- [`compute_ridit_scores()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/compute_ridit_scores.md)
  : Compute ridit scores (cumulative midpoint ranks) for inequality
  measures
- [`dceasimR-package`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/dceasimR-package.md)
  [`dceasimR`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/dceasimR-package.md)
  : dceasimR: Distributional Cost-Effectiveness Analysis for Health
  Technology Assessment
- [`england_imd_hale`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/england_imd_hale.md)
  : England IMD quintile Health-Adjusted Life Expectancy data
- [`england_imd_qol`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/england_imd_qol.md)
  : England IMD quintile EQ-5D utility norms
- [`example_cea_output`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/example_cea_output.md)
  : Example CEA model output
- [`export_dcea_excel()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/export_dcea_excel.md)
  : Export DCEA results to Excel (NICE submission format)
- [`generate_dcea_report()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/generate_dcea_report.md)
  : Generate a full DCEA report
- [`generate_nice_table()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/generate_nice_table.md)
  : Generate NICE-formatted DCEA submission table
- [`get_baseline_health()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/get_baseline_health.md)
  : Get baseline health distribution for a country
- [`merge_cea_with_baseline()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/merge_cea_with_baseline.md)
  : Merge CEA model output with baseline health distribution
- [`normalise_weights()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/normalise_weights.md)
  : Normalise population weights to sum to 1
- [`nsclc_dcea_example`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/nsclc_dcea_example.md)
  : NSCLC DCEA worked example
- [`plot(`*`<aggregate_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot.aggregate_dcea.md)
  : Plot method for aggregate_dcea
- [`plot(`*`<full_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot.full_dcea.md)
  : Plot method for full_dcea
- [`plot_dcea_tornado()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot_dcea_tornado.md)
  : Plot Tornado Diagram for DCEA Sensitivity Analysis
- [`plot_ede_profile()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot_ede_profile.md)
  : Plot EDE Profile
- [`plot_equity_impact_plane()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot_equity_impact_plane.md)
  : Plot Equity-Efficiency Impact Plane
- [`plot_inequality_staircase()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot_inequality_staircase.md)
  : Plot Inequality Staircase
- [`plot_lorenz_curve()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/plot_lorenz_curve.md)
  : Plot Lorenz Curve for Health Distribution
- [`prepare_subgroup_cea()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/prepare_subgroup_cea.md)
  : Prepare subgroup CEA data for DCEA
- [`print(`*`<aggregate_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/print.aggregate_dcea.md)
  : Print method for aggregate_dcea
- [`print(`*`<full_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/print.full_dcea.md)
  : Print method for full_dcea
- [`run_aggregate_dcea()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/run_aggregate_dcea.md)
  : Run Aggregate DCEA
- [`run_dcea_sensitivity()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/run_dcea_sensitivity.md)
  : Run DCEA Sensitivity Analysis
- [`run_full_dcea()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/run_full_dcea.md)
  : Run Full-Form DCEA
- [`summary(`*`<aggregate_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/summary.aggregate_dcea.md)
  : Summary method for aggregate_dcea
- [`summary(`*`<full_dcea>`*`)`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/summary.full_dcea.md)
  : Summary method for full_dcea
- [`validate_dcea_data()`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/validate_dcea_data.md)
  : Validate and format DCEA input data
- [`who_regions_hale`](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/reference/who_regions_hale.md)
  : WHO regional HALE data

  Analysis](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v01_introduction_to_dcea.md):
- [Aggregate DCEA
  Tutorial](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v02_aggregate_dcea_tutorial.md):
- [Full-Form DCEA
  Tutorial](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v03_full_dcea_tutorial.md):
- [Inequality Measurement in
  DCEA](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v04_inequality_measures.md):
- [Social Welfare Functions in
  DCEA](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v05_social_welfare_functions.md):

  Workflow](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v06_nice_submission_workflow.md):
- [International Applications of
  DCEA](https://heorlytics.github.io/dceasimR/articles/v07_international_applications.md):
